label: 2023 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
race_name: Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres

extraction.one_line_summary: POGACAR attacked repeatedly on first Kwaremont-Paterberg pairing, dropped VAN DER POEL after chain unship, soloed 30+ seconds for victory
tactical_patterns: POGACAR launched constant attacks on first Kwaremont-Paterberg pairing specifically to avoid sprint finish against VAN DER POEL
VAN DER POEL chased down quality 15-rider breakaway before favorites began attacking each other on climbs
PIDCOCK worked for GIRMAY after breakaway fractured, burning own chances despite being in leading group
Trek's PEDERSEN animated from breakaway to finish fourth, surviving favorite attacks after group splintered

rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: deliberately attacked early on first Kwaremont-Paterberg to eliminate sprint scenario, tactical maturity beyond prior fourth place
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: chain unship on crucial climb cost contact with POGACAR, couldn't close 15-second gap expanding to 30+
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: neutral: strong enough for leading group but sacrificed own result for GIRMAY domestique work
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: survived from 15-rider breakaway through favorite attacks to finish fourth, exceptional stamina
rider_signals.WOUT VAN AERT: negative: Jumbo-Visma labeled strongest team pre-race but invisible in decisive moments, major underperformance
